data.title: Ellucian Live 2026 to feature keynotes, panels, and student voices on strategy, success, and AI innovation. Celebrity guest to attend.
data.description: Key executives, panels from various institutions, and student representatives will share valuable information on strategic planning, student achievement, and innovation driven by artificial intelligence in the higher education sector. The event will also feature a guest appearance by a prominent celebrity. The event is set to take place in Reston, Virginia on February 20, 2026. Ellucian, a top provider of technology solutions for higher education, will be facilitating the event.

data.title: Inventors from Wesley Chapel create new product to move concrete quickly using the DUAL POWERED EXTRACTION VAC.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 20, 2026, two inventors from Wesley Chapel, Florida, unveiled their innovative creation called the Dual Powered Extraction Vac. The inventors shared that their inspiration came from the need for a fast and efficient method to transfer concrete from a truck's mixer drum to various worksites or containers. This invention is designed to streamline this process and improve efficiency in construction projects. The Dual Powered Extraction Vac is expected to make a significant impact in the industry by offering a quick and convenient solution.

data.title: Law firm advises Centreville gas explosion victims to seek legal counsel to understand their rights.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, the renowned personal injury law firm Regan Zambri Long PLLC in Northern Virginia and Washington, D.C. advised individuals affected by the recent natural gas blast in Centreville, Virginia, to promptly seek legal assistance to comprehend their entitlements. The incident resulted in injuries and displacement of several residents in the area.

data.title: Anthropic debuts Claude Code Security to uncover 500+ zero-day vulnerabilities in open-source software. Apply now for early access.
data.description: Anthropic's latest Claude Code Security tool has revealed over 500 vulnerabilities present in various open-source projects. Both enterprise and open-source maintainers are invited to request early access to the tool to address these issues. For further information, interested parties can refer to the full article.

data.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's global tariffs. Russell 2000 drops 0.4%, Nasdaq 100 gains 0.5%. Justices question $130B refund. Market split - small caps fall, EM stocks soar. Taxation powers given solely to Congress.
data.description: The Supreme Court struck down President Trump's global tariffs, causing a split reaction on Wall Street. The Russell 2000 fell 0.4%, while the Nasdaq 100 gained 0.5%. The Court ruled that the president does not have the authority to impose tariffs under the IEEPA, emphasizing Congress's power over taxation. The decision raised questions about refunding over $130 billion in tariffs collected. Small-cap companies relying on import duties faced a negative impact. This led to a boost for globally oriented equities and emerging markets. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: HauteSheet TV showcases Sonoma County on REAL Shows Network, led by Tara Polley. Airing on RSN from Feb. 20, 2026.
data.description: A series hosted by Tara Polley showcasing the individuals, communities, and companies that shape Sonoma County is being featured. The show is being hosted in Santa Rosa, California, as of February 20, 2026. REAL Shows Network (RSN), a TV network focused on enhancing real estate and lifestyle narratives, is behind this initiative.
